name: Nan city retail and airport band
notes: Nan city cluster combining retail, hospital, airport, bus terminal, and civic activity where destination charging should be stronger than tourism-only interpretation.

name: Wiang Sa Route 101 service corridor
notes: Strongest Nan AADT is on the Wiang Sa - Dok Kham Tai connector and Route 101 south approach; this should read as a practical service corridor.

name: Tha Wang Pha north service corridor
notes: Tha Wang Pha is a genuine northbound service town and should carry year-round corridor demand beyond pure tourism.

name: Pua district service town
notes: Pua should retain service-town demand from hospital/retail/community activity, while still not being treated like a major city.
